_README: EMPTY TEMPLATE. Cyber Controller ships NO BlueJammer control frames. This is the slot for YOU to fill in with a control map captured from YOUR OWN device, under your own authorization, for use only inside an authorized RF-shielded enclosure. Operating an RF jammer is illegal outside such a context (47 U.S.C. 333). STOP/Idle, the 'Open control web UI' launcher, and cutting power all work WITHOUT this file. Load a completed map via the BlueJammer panel -> 'Load control map...'.
_schema: validated:bool | uart_frames:{Mode: hex-string} | http_calls:{Mode: [method, path, body]}. Modes: Idle | Bluetooth | BLE | WiFi | RC/Drone. Idle = STOP.
_inert_by_default: While validated=false (or the frames are blank) the controller stays inert and refuses to send (ControlUnavailable). The app does not provide the frames and will not derive them for you.
